tool_calls.name: search_menu
tool_calls.result: Browse result for 'fish' (mention at most TWO in ONE casual sentence — never a numbered list): Amritsari Fish Pakora → say "Fish Pakora" | Punjabi Fish Curry → say "Punjabi Fish Curry". Good: "ਹਾਂ ਜੀ, ਸਾਡੇ ਕੋਲ X ਤੇ Y ਹੈ — ਕਿਹੜਾ?" Bad: "1 X, 2 Y" or "first X, second Y". Ask which they would like.

turns.assistant: ਹਾਂ ਜੀ, ਸਾਡੇ ਕੋਲ Fish Pakora ਤੇ Punjabi Fish Curry ਹੈ — ਕਿਹੜਾ ਚਾਹੁੰਦੇ ਹੋ?

tool_calls.name: add_item
tool_calls.result:
ADDED: 1 x Fish Pakora (Amritsari Fish Pakora).
ORDER NOW: 1 x Fish Pakora (Amritsari Fish Pakora). total=$14.99
GUIDE: confirm the add briefly in the customer's language using the exact dish name and quantity above (quantity spoken as "one", never a digit), then keep the order moving.

turns.assistant: One Fish Pakora added. Anything else?

tool_calls.name: record_additional_requests

args.response: No special requests, no allergies, medium spice preferred.

tool_calls.result:
ADDITIONAL REQUESTS RECORDED for the kitchen: "No special requests, no allergies, medium spice preferred.".
SPICE DEFAULTED: Fish Pakora set to medium (no preference stated — use set_item_spice if the customer actually named a level).
ORDER NOW: 1 x Fish Pakora (Amritsari Fish Pakora) [medium]. total=$14.99
GUIDE: acknowledge briefly in the customer's language — do NOT re-ask about spice or allergies — then keep the order moving (pickup or delivery next if not set yet).

turns.assistant: ਠੀਕ ਹੈ ਜੀ, ਕੋਈ ਹੋਰ ਖਾਸ ਗੱਲ ਨਹੀਂ। Pickup ਕਰਨਾ ਹੈ ਜਾਂ delivery?

assertions.check: transcript never contains 'Punjabi Fish Curry ਅਤੇ'
